title: phyllostegia micrantha
intro: Phyllostegia micrantha, also known as the little-leaf phyllostegia, is a perennial shrub native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with dried leaves being steeped in hot water to create a medicinal herbal preparation.
